PreToolUse.description: Log the tool usage to a file for auditing purposes.
Protect sensitive files from being modified or deleted.

SessionStart.description: Handle tasks when a session starts, such as loading previous context or initializing resources.

Stop.description: Handle tasks when a session ends, such as saving state or cleaning up resources.
Evaluate the session's performance and log metrics for analysis.

PreCompact.description: Handle tasks before context compaction, such as saving state or logging events.
